name: ig-iap-tunnel-action
description: GitHub Action to set up an IAP tunnel to a GCP instance group via ig-iap-tunnel

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/post.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --outfile=dist/post/index.js && node scripts/postbuild.js
